heroCopy.lede: This page is designed like a premium educational website — but when you print it, it becomes a clean worksheet. Read each section, study the images, then answer in the writing boxes (type on screen or write on paper).
heroCopy.whatStudentsLearn: In this lesson, students will explore key concepts and develop understanding through inquiry-based activities. Each section includes quick facts, a look-closely mission, and writing prompts that build vocabulary and complete-sentence explanations.
studentDirections: Read the section and study the image.
Use the Quick Facts to support your answers.
Write in complete sentences when asked.
On paper: you may circle, label, or underline key details.

keyVocabulary.def: Definition of first key vocabulary term.

Definition of fourth key vocabulary term.
